commands.command: npm run backend:build && node --test backend-dist/database.test.js backend-dist/server.test.js
commands.summary: Database and HTTP coverage for CLV-010 passed. Unknown inbound messages now create unlinked threads instead of implicit contacts; existing contact points resolve thread identity; link-thread attaches the thread number as a contact point; contacts can be created from a thread; ignore clears unread state; block creates a blocked contact point and blocked contact policy. 25/25 selected backend tests pass.

Renderer coverage passed. Contact editing loads contact points, adds a labeled point through POST /api/contacts/points, toggles point blocking through POST /api/contacts/points/block, and links a thread to an existing contact through POST /api/link-thread. 22/22 renderer tests pass.

Full suite green: 71 deterministic tests pass, 1 live Twilio test skipped by design. Backend build, renderer build, renderer interaction tests, backend node tests, and main/preload/runtime syntax checks all passed.

commands.command: python scripts/repopact_cli.py dashboard && python scripts/repopact_cli.py doctor && python scripts/validate_repo.py
commands.summary: RepoPact records are current: dashboard regenerated, doctor reports healthy, and repository governance validation passed.
Local system audit passed: required files, 18 work items, lifecycle counts, stale README checks, work item manifests, and Markdown link/date checks are current.

commands.command: npm run scan:secrets && npm run scan:deps
commands.summary: Secret scan clean and production dependency audit reports 0 vulnerabilities.

environment.process_note: 015 Phase 3 CLV-010 (contact points and unknown inbound handling). Contacts support multiple labeled points through the existing v8 contact_points table and renderer editor. Thread creation resolves through contact_points and no longer silently creates contacts for unknown inbound numbers. Unknown numbers can be attached to an existing contact, turned into a new contact from the thread, ignored, or blocked. Exports now include contact_points and contact_policy. Call-log resolution through contact points remains covered by the CLV-010 model but awaits the future voice/call-history criteria because durable call rows are not implemented yet.
